testcase.name: test_host_request_fresh_create_omits_auto_approve_at
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:68: in viewer_token _, tok = _register_viewer() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:50: in _register_viewer super_tok = _login(SUPER_EMAIL, SUPER_PASS) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:32: in _login return r.json()["access_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_host_request_already_pending_omits_auto_approve_at
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:68: in viewer_token _, tok = _register_viewer() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:50: in _register_viewer super_tok = _login(SUPER_EMAIL, SUPER_PASS) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:32: in _login return r.json()["access_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'

testcase.name: test_super_admin_list_still_has_auto_approve_at_server_side
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:99: in test_super_admin_list_still_has_auto_approve_at_server_side tok = _login(SUPER_EMAIL, SUPER_PASS) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iter16_no_upload_leak.py:32: in _login return r.json()["access_token"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'access_token'
